data.name: Qiongjiu

weaponImprint.name: Golden Melody
weaponImprint.trait: If the user has full HP at the end of the action, she gains a random buff, lasting for 1 turn.
weaponImprint.effect: Increase damage dealt by 10%/10%/15%/20%/20%/20%. When gaining buffs, increase damage dealt by the next [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] by 10%/15%/15%/15%/20%/20% 1/1/1/1/1/2 time(s), stacking up to 2/2/3/3/4/4 times.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Increase damage dealt to ELIDs by 2.5%. If the target is not protected by Cover, increase it by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: A Doll who steps up to shoulder heavy responsibilities. She dedicates her time and energy to Griffin, while perfectly maintaining her individuality, thanks to her precise and efficient work planning. She never deviates, never breaks the rules; rather than changing the plan, she prefers to change reality.

skills.name: Fuse
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Steady Plan
skills.description: Gains 1 point of Confectance Index each time after dealing damage. Increases damage dealt to targets not under the protection of Cover by 10%. When an enemy unit within range receives targeted damage from an ally, performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Physical damage equal to 90% of attack and 2 points of stability damage. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Gains 1 point of Confectance Index each time after dealing damage. Increases damage dealt to targets not under the protection of Cover by 10%. When an enemy unit within range receives targeted damage from an ally, performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Physical damage equal to 90% of attack and 2 points of stability damage. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn. After performing [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] to the target for 2 turns. Damage dealt by [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] is increased by 10%.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Gains 1 point of Confectance Index each time after dealing damage. Increases damage dealt to targets not under the protection of Cover by 20%. When an enemy unit within range receives targeted damage from an ally, performs 1 instance of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Physical damage equal to 90% of attack and 2 points of stability damage. This effect can be triggered up to 3 times per turn. After performing [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] to the target for 2 turns. Damage dealt by [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] is increased by 10%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: After [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], apply [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] to the target for 2 turns. [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3]'s damage increases by 10%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Increases damage by 10% against targets without Cover protection.

skills.name: Common Rail
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, deals Burn damage equal to 150% of attack to them and the user gains [effect:e1d78dfe-8609-4ee8-a770-ac155116bff3].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 8 tiles, dealing Burn damage equal to 150% of attack to them. Additionally, this unit gains [effect:e1d78dfe-8609-4ee8-a770-ac155116bff3] as well. If the enemy is killed from this skill, increases the damage bonus from [effect:e1d78dfe-8609-4ee8-a770-ac155116bff3] by 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If a kill is scored, increase the damage bonus of [effect:e1d78dfe-8609-4ee8-a770-ac155116bff3] to 30%.

skills.name: Guide to Victory
skills.description: Selects 1 direction and deals AoE Burn damage equal to 110% of attack to the first enemy target within 8 tiles in the selected direction. Applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 direction and deals AoE Burn damage equal to 110% of attack to the first enemy target within 8 tiles in the selected direction. Applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 2 turns. If the target is already affected by [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], the critical rate of this attack is increased by 100%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If the target is inflicted with [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a], increases the critical rate of this attack by 100%.

skills.name: Pressing the Momentum
skills.description: Gains 3 stacks of [effect:faecc72a-efdd-48e7-a947-60d52f647024]. At max Confectance Index, gains 1 additional stack and increases the maximum number of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] this turn by 1.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Gains 3 stacks of [effect:faecc72a-efdd-48e7-a947-60d52f647024]. At max Confectance Index, gains 1 additional stack and increases the maximum number of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] this turn by 1. Applies [effect:0b76cac3-8e34-4e32-98d8-d204e26522d7] for 1 turn to targets not protected by Cover.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Gains 3 stacks of [effect:faecc72a-efdd-48e7-a947-60d52f647024]. At max Confectance Index, gains 1 additional stack and increases the maximum number of [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] this turn by 1. Applies [effect:0b76cac3-8e34-4e32-98d8-d204e26522d7] to targets not protected by Cover. When performing [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], applies [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8] to self and the allied unit before the aforementioned allied unit makes their attack, lasting for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Applies [effect:0b76cac3-8e34-4e32-98d8-d204e26522d7] to targets that are not protected by Cover for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: When performing [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], applies [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8] to self and the allied unit for 1 turn before the aforementioned allied unit makes their attack.

keys.effect: Increase damage dealt outside of the unit's own turn by 7%.
Damage type dealt by [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] is changed to Burn damage, and damage dealt to targets with Burn debuffs is increased by 15%.
Gains 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of the battle.
Before Support Action, cleanses 1 buff from the target.
While in Support Mode, applies [effect:1403cc19-233b-4c0c-8335-83cda83c7a62] to the target for 1 turn before the allied unit's attack.
Modify the effect of active skill Guide to Victory to deal damage to all enemy targets within 8 tiles in the selected direction. All enemy targets except the first receive 30% less damage.
When a phase weakness is exploited using the active skill Common Rail, gains [effect:6d138a9f-2068-42d9-9ecb-bfd3000a4ac8] for 2 turns.
When under the effect of Support Boost, gain immunity to displacement effects applied by enemy units.

vertebrae.effect: If a kill is scored, increase the damage bonus of [effect:e1d78dfe-8609-4ee8-a770-ac155116bff3] to 30%.

doll.name: Qiongjiu
doll.effects: A Doll who steps up to shoulder heavy responsibilities. She dedicates her time and energy to Griffin, while perfectly maintaining her individuality, thanks to her precise and efficient work planning. She never deviates, never breaks the rules; rather than changing the plan, she prefers to change reality.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt by Support Attacks is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Burn damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
Damage dealt by attacks that only hit 1 enemy unit is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Increase damage dealt with [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] by 15%. Damage against exposed units is increased by 10%. Activates 1 time. This buff cannot be cleansed.
Increase damage dealt with [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3] by 30%. Damage against exposed units is increased by 10%. Activates 1 time. This buff cannot be cleansed.
